avatarScaling.title: Whakarahinga Avatar
avatarScaling.subtitle: Te whakarahinga teitei OSC ā-VRChat ake — ka mahi ki tētahi atu avatar
avatarScaling.saveWorlds: Tiakina te rahi i waenga i ngā ao
avatarScaling.hotkeyHint: Ka mahi ngā hotkey puta noa (ahakoa kei a VRChat te aro). Ki te kore e taea te hopu i tētahi kī, ka taea tonu e koe te whakamahi i te pahu retireti i runga ake nei.
translator.title: Kaiwhakamāori
translator.aiGrammarFix: Whakatikahia te wetereo mā te AI i mua (ka whakamahi i te kaiwhakarato IntelliChat kei runga ake)
translator.note: Ka whakamahia e te kōwhiringa whakamāori pouaka kōrero Live Typing me ngā wāhi katoa o te taupānga e tuku ana i te "Whakamāoritia i mua i te tuku."
liveTyping.title: Patopato Ora
liveTyping.subtitle: ka tukuna i a koe e patopato ana, ānō nei ko te pouaka kōrero ake a VRChat
liveTyping.placeholder: Patopatohia ki konei — ka tukuna aunoa tēnei ki te pouaka kōrero i ia hēkona iti i a koe e patopato ana. Kia mau ki te patopato i tua atu i te 144 pūāhua; ka whakaatu a VRChat i te '…' + te mutunga o tō karere.
liveTyping.translateLabel: Whakamāoritia i mua i te tuku (ka whakamahi i ngā tautuhinga Kaiwhakamāori)
languagePicker.title: Kōwhiria tō reo
languagePicker.subtitle: Ka taea e koe te huri i tēnei ā muri ake i roto i ngā Tautuhinga.
settingsLanguage.title: Reo
settingsLanguage.label: Reo Taupānga
